# Summarize Governance — Reference Assets

This directory contains templates and examples for single-page governance briefings.

## Contents

### Briefing Templates
- One-page governance summary template
- Salient points extraction checklist
- Risk matrix template
- Actionable items extraction template

### Example Briefings
- Architecture governance briefing
- Security governance briefing
- Testing governance briefing
- DevOps/CI-CD governance briefing

### Guidelines
- Single-page formatting standards
- Hierarchy and emphasis patterns
- Cross-reference linking standards

## Usage

Reference these materials when:
- Synthesizing complex governance artifacts into one-page summaries
- Extracting high-level risks and remediation recommendations
- Presenting governance health to stakeholders
- Identifying common governance patterns across workspace

## Contributing

Add new example briefings as governance domains expand.
